title: Ras Al Khaimah、Ras Al Khaimah — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]

概述

Ras Al Khaimah是Ras Al Khaimah的一个城市，人口约400,000。The UAE’s northernmost emirate, known for its dramatic Hajar mountains, beaches, and growing tourism sector.
